citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection at 11:30 a.m. on 5/14/2026.
The inspector attempted to contact the licensee through a facility employee, who reached the licensee by phone. The
licensee communicated, through the employee, that they would not be available for an inspection and would not permit
the facility staff on-site to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility,
animals, and records as required is a violation of the Animal Welfare Act and its regulations. Continued failure to provide
access is a serious concern and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection at 11:30 a.m. on 5/14/2026. 
The inspector attempted to contact the licensee through a facility employee, who reached the licensee by phone. The 
licensee communicated, through the employee, that they would not be available for an inspection and would not permit 
the facility staff on-site to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, 
animals, and records as required is a violation of the Animal Welfare Act and its regulations. Continued failure to provide 
access is a serious concern and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
